last_agent_action: Added a bounded recurring relationship-reflection loop to the runtime and template assistant surfaces, validated the new reflection status and write path locally, and prepared the pack for a focused remote replay of the reflection slice.

last_validation_results.summary: Recorded passing validation readiness evidence for the build-pack contract.
Recorded passing inherited benchmark readiness evidence for the assistant smoke path.

resume_instructions: Read the objective, backlog, and work-state files before editing code.
Inspect `.pack-state/agent-memory/latest-memory.json` first when it exists, then fall back to other `.pack-state/agent-memory/*.json` files.
Inspect the operator-intake, session-distillation, operator-profile, memory-policy, and partnership-policy surfaces before changing assistant behavior.
Inspect show-business-review, show-relationship-reflection, show-memory-distillation, and the next remote UAT roundtrip state before choosing the next assistant-behavior slice.
stop_conditions: Stop when the current recurring relationship-reflection slice is implemented and existing bounded validation surfaces pass.
Stop and escalate if the next action would require changing registry, deployment pointer, or promotion state directly.
